title: Team Member Details

fields.label: Job Title
fields.name: job_title
fields.instructions: e.g. "Director", "Mechanical Engineer". Migrate directly from the live Leadership page (page 972) — see IMPLEMENTATION-GUIDE.md's migration table for all 7 real values.

fields.label: Qualifications
fields.name: qualifications
fields.instructions: Post-nominal letters and professional memberships as currently shown, e.g. "BEng (Hons), MIET" or "CEng, FEI, FIET, FHEA, PhD, MEng, MRes, BEng". Deliberately one field, not split into Qualifications/Credentials — see DECISIONS.md.

fields.label: Biography
fields.name: biography
fields.instructions: Directors currently have a longer Expertise/Value paragraph; team members currently have a shorter one-line qualifications/focus summary. Both fit this one field as-is — migrate the exact live text, do not pad shorter bios to match the directors' length.

fields.label: Team Group
fields.name: team_group
fields.instructions: Preserves the live page's two-section layout ("Directors" then "The team"). Not in the original mission's example field list — added because the shortcode needs it to render the same two-group structure the live page already has; see DECISIONS.md.

fields.label: Profile Image
fields.name: profile_image
fields.instructions: Return format: ID. All 7 real photos are already uploaded to the Media Library — see migration table for each person's existing attachment ID (no new uploads needed).

fields.label: Display Order
fields.name: display_order
fields.instructions: Controls presentation order within each Team Group. Migrate using each person's current position on the live Leadership page (1–7, see migration table).

fields.label: LinkedIn URL
fields.name: linkedin_url
fields.instructions: No LinkedIn URLs exist anywhere in the current live content for any of the 7 people — CRN-001 lists "LinkedIn integration approach" as an explicitly open, unresolved decision. Leave blank for all real records; do not invent or guess profile URLs.

description: CMS-002 deployment package — field model for the existing cspt-team-member CPT. Deliberately excludes Featured Flag and Areas of Expertise (no verified live content or target taxonomy justifies them — all 7 people are shown, none marked as "featured"; expertise areas are already captured inline in Qualifications/Biography) and does not split Qualifications from Credentials (the live content mixes academic and professional-membership letters in one string per person, with no clean existing split to migrate from). See DECISIONS.md.
